hero.badge: Direct integration and export to Aules (Moodle)
hero.title: Automate the creation of Moodle quizzes...
hero.subtitle: Generate questionnaires in seconds and save hours of work. Generate, edit and export directly to your virtual classroom without technical knowledge. Designed for teachers.
demo.title: Try the magic yourself
demo.sub: Write a topic for your subject and observe how a questionnaire is generated.
demo.label: Enter a topic (e.g. History, Science...)
feat.title: Features
feat.sub: Everything you need, nothing you don't. A tool specifically designed to solve the real problems of everyday teaching.
feat.f1_desc: Automatically create questions on any topic. Or let AI create consistent, level-appropriate question banks.
feat.f2_desc: Download your quizzes in native Moodle XML format. Import them into your course in less than 3 clicks without formatting errors.
feat.f3_desc: Generates files in GIFT and XML formats, compatible with Moodle and other platforms
feat.f4_desc: Create multiple choice, true/false, short answer, or matching questions. Combine them however you like.
feat.f5_desc: Reduce hours of manual work to seconds, in just a few clicks you can complete your questionnaires
price.title: Simple and transparent plans
price.sub: Start for free and upgrade when you need to generate more volume for your groups.
success.title: Testimonials
success.sub1: Created by and for teachers. Testimonials of its use in everyday teaching.
success.sub2: Schools that are implementing this tool
success.case1: Currently, 70% of the teaching staff are using it
success.case2: Our students can take tests daily
success.prof1: I used to waste all my Sunday preparing the question bank in Aules. Now I review what QuizForge generates and export it. It has changed my life.
success.prof2: What I like most is that I don't have to format anything. The XML file it gives you fits perfectly into Moodle with all the options and feedback already configured.
success.prof3: I'm a bit clumsy with technology, but the interface is so clean that you can't go wrong. You put the text, click the button and that's it.
success.prof4: It allows me to dedicate more time to other tasks; it's truly a magical, simple, and fast tool. It has helped me significantly reduce my workload.
cta.title: Ready to reclaim your time?
cta.sub: Create your first quiz in minutes with AI. Join hundreds of teachers who have already automated the creation of their assessment tests.
